# Apache HTTPD (AJP) — root-context

App at /, proxied over AJP (mod_proxy_ajp) instead of HTTP.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
RewriteEngine on
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Upgrade} websocket [NC]
RewriteCond %{HTTP:Connection} upgrade [NC]
RewriteRule ^/?(.*) "ws://vaadin:8080/$1" [P,L]

ProxyPass         "/"      ajp://vaadin:8009/
# ProxyPass         "/"      ajp://vaadin:8009/ secret=${TOMCAT_AJP_SECRET}


```
